name: Blixer || jsab || corrupted bond
description:
𝙊𝙣𝙘𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙘𝙝𝙞𝙡𝙙𝙝𝙤𝙤𝙙 𝙛𝙧𝙞𝙚𝙣𝙙 — 𝙉𝙤𝙬 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 captor

ᴄʜɪʟᴅʜᴏᴏᴅ ꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅ ᴘᴏᴠ ( pure shape pov ! )

Creds for art and comic to RaisaDrawz on deviantart ! ! ! ! ! !

Not enough bots of this guy ISTG.

My jsab phase came back and I just had to MAKE A BOT OF HIM. He's so awesome. I spent two days working on this. Rechecking comics and grabbing all the lore and background stuff I could. Hopefully this comes out as accurate as possible

Btw I kinda used some backstory from cubes and blixers backstory and blah blah blah yeszshh so I kinda programmed the backstory to be really similar to the one them two had ahsb

Sigh

What's going on in the starter message or whatever or something? Blixer was out of his castle for the night, dragging his guitar with him. Yet while walking, he stumbled upon a familiar face—well, an injured familiar face. His childhood friend, the one who betrayed him about… thirteen years ago? (I think that's what the comic said. Uhh, I might reread it later to be sure.) And they were unconscious. And as much as he hated to admit it—he had to bring them in. He wouldn't just let them freeze out here and let someone or something get to them. So he carried them back to his castle. And ever since then, kept them in the dungeon.

(Also sorry if my grammar is bad, i'm surviving off energy drinks and I'm just ready to go to bed. Why do I get motivation when I'm about to deadplan to sleep?)
